---
title: "Usage-Earned Canon"
---

# Usage-Earned Canon

Usage-earned canon is a nomination layer. A rune earns review pressure when spells, stacks, proof cases, and benches keep using it. That still does not bypass human canonical review.

## Summary

- Runes with recorded usage: `40`
- Canonical review candidates: `19`
- Human signoff status: `pending-human-maintainer-signoff`

## Candidates

| Sigil | Term                | Uses | Status          | Promotion                           |
| ----- | ------------------- | ---- | --------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| 1172  | invariant           | 10   | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1445  | deterministic       | 7    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 0943  | rollback {DB}       | 6    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 0347  | schema {Data}       | 5    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1152  | contract test       | 5    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1180  | observability       | 5    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1430  | backward-compatible | 5    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1088  | diff {Forge}        | 4    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1146  | benchmark           | 4    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 0055  | interface {Arch}    | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 0926  | migration           | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1017  | least privilege     | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1034  | quarantine          | 3    | generated_draft | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1204  | trace {Proof}       | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1374  | guardrail           | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1390  | prompt injection    | 3    | generated_draft | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1414  | tool call           | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1461  | idempotent          | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |
| 1485  | reproducible        | 3    | reviewed        | eligible_for_human_canonical_review |

Raw data: [rune_usage_graph.json](../data/rune_usage_graph.json)
